title: loeselia glandulosa var. ramosissima
intro: Loeselia glandulosa var. ramosissima, also known as Sierra Mountain Blazing Star or Woodland Blazing Star, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Loeselia glandulosa var. ramosissima include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to make topical applications for skin issues and injuries.
